markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on creating template pages for community projects.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Template Pages:** `growthx.ai` will create template pages for high-quality community projects, starting with a 12-project Wave 1 list.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**Access Method:** Sebastian will remix projects with their chat history and transfer them to `growthx.ai`'s workspace, providing the full context needed for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**V2 Page Design:** `growthx.ai` will propose a V2 template page design that balances SEO with user experience, optimizing for quick comprehension.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** `growthx.ai` will use new template categories (e.g., e-commerce) from community projects to inform its own 5-template/week production, creating variations to accelerate content growth.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Template Page Creation for Community Projects

  - [**Goal:** Create template pages for high-quality community projects to diversify the template gallery beyond just blogs and portfolios.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Challenge:** `growthx.ai`'s automated workflow requires the project's chat history for analysis, which is not available for public projects.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Solution:** Sebastian will remix projects with their chat history and transfer them to `growthx.ai`'s workspace, providing the necessary context.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Solution: Template Page Generation & V2 Design

  - [**Wave 1:** `growthx.ai` will create pages for a 12-project list (7 existing + 5 new community projects).](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [**V2 Page Design:** `growthx.ai` will propose a V2 template page design to balance SEO with user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current SEO-focused pages are not optimized for quick user comprehension.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
      - [**Goal:** Help users determine relevance within 2-3 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
      - [**Example Tweak:** Add "Who is this for?" boxes at the top to highlight personas (e.g., "Photographers," "Marketers").](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Strategic Alignment: Template Production

  - [**`growthx.ai`'s 5-Template/Week Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Creating variations of an existing template type is faster than building a new one from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Use new template categories from community projects (e.g., e-commerce) to inform their own production, creating variations to accelerate content growth.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Lovable's Template Vision:**](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
      - [**Goal:** 100 high-quality templates by EOY (via agency & partners) to populate the new gallery.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Landing Page:** Feature a curated selection of 3–6 templates.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
      - [**Dashboard:** Provide a "Discover" section with "Apps" and "Templates" links.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Remix and transfer Wave 1 projects with chat history.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [Confirm Wave 1 delivery timeline with team (due to varying project complexity).](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [Propose timeline for V2 template page design.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
      - [Share updates on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/aZ6EyiQW6ubsPFoA2XsFSoZsFmvqT7Dq?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
